calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-26-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for a Short Cause Trial. No appearance by defendant (s).
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(S) LANCE A. GRABMILLER.
The court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.
Declaration of Maria Marin pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant(s) as follows:
Principal $19,963.32
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $425.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $20,388.32
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2015 Set For Trial On May-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
